'''''Star Wars: Jedi Adventure''''' is a game created for [[Tiger Electronics]]' [[Wikipedia:R-Zone|R-Zone]] handheld gaming system, released in [[1997]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''*''Play as Luke Skywalker, Jedi Knight!''''
''*''Use your trusty blaster and lightsaber to battle the forces of evil!''''
''*''Rescue Han Solo, Princess Leia, and Chewbacca from Jabba the Hutt!''''
